name: Python logging (conventional)
sampleLines: 2024-04-28 04:02:03,123 - myapp.module - INFO - Server started on port 8080
2024-04-28 04:02:05,789 - myapp - ERROR - Failed to connect to backend: ConnectionRefusedError
description: Stock example for Python's stdlib `logging` module using the conventional `%(asctime)s - %(name)s - %(levelname)s - %(message)s` format string. Python has no portable default (each app calls `logging.basicConfig` with its own format), so this ships as a user-template example rather than a built-in. Copy this file into <AppDataLocation>/regex_templates/ to enable; set `autoDetect` to true if you want it in the probe loop.
